name: Order → Notification Integration order creation given new order when created then notification service sends confirmation email
Order → Notification Integration order confirmation given existing order when confirmed then customer receives processing notification
Order → Notification Integration order cancellation given existing order when cancelled then customer receives cancellation notification with reason
Order → Notification Integration MockNotificationSender reset given sent notifications and shouldFail set when reset is called then clears state
Order → Notification Integration notification sender failure given sender failure when order is created then notification is persisted as FAILED status
Order → Notification Integration full order lifecycle given order when progressing through lifecycle then correct notifications are sent at each stage
AgentInsightStore append given a new insight when appended then it can be read back
AgentInsightStore append given multiple appends when reading then all records are returned in runAt order
AgentInsightStore append given insights from two agents when appended then each lands in its own file
AgentInsightStore readAll given empty store when reading all then returns empty array
AgentInsightStore readAll given multiple agents with multiple insights when reading all then all records are returned
AgentInsightStore readSince given insights at different times when reading since a cutoff then only newer records are returned
AgentInsightStore readSince given empty store when reading since a cutoff then returns empty array
AgentInsightStore readByAgent given insights from multiple agents when reading by agent then only that agents records are returned
AgentInsightStore readByAgent given no insights for an agent when reading by that agent then returns empty array
AgentInsightStore horus agent insights given a horus-felix insight when appended then typed details are preserved verbatim
AgentInsightStore horus agent insights given a horus-percy insight when appended then typed verdict and violations are preserved
AgentInsightStore horus agent insights given horus and standard agent insights when querying by category then each category is isolated
AgentInsightStore horus agent insights given mixed standard and horus insights when reading all then all are returned together
AgentInsightStore horus agent insights given a horus insight with ALLOW verdict when severity is info
CoverageStore append given a new snapshot when appended then it can be read back
CoverageStore append given multiple snapshots when reading then all are returned sorted by capturedAt ascending
CoverageStore readAll given empty store when reading then returns empty array
CoverageStore latestDelta given fewer than two snapshots when computing delta then returns null
CoverageStore latestDelta given empty store when computing delta then returns null
CoverageStore latestDelta given two snapshots when computing delta then returns diff between last two
CoverageStore latestDelta given three snapshots when computing delta then uses only the two most recent
computeDelta given coverage that improved when computing delta then returns positive deltas and belowThreshold false
computeDelta given coverage below threshold when computing delta then belowThreshold is true
computeDelta given coverage exactly at threshold when computing delta then belowThreshold is false
computeDelta given fractional coverage values when computing delta then rounds to one decimal place
analyzeEventContracts given source files with no event topics when analyzed then report has zero topics
analyzeEventContracts given a declared topic with no test coverage when analyzed then it is fully uncovered
analyzeEventContracts given a topic covered on publish side when analyzed then publishCovered is true
analyzeEventContracts given a topic covered on subscribe side when analyzed then subscribeCovered is true
analyzeEventContracts given a topic covered on both sides when analyzed then fullyCovered count increments
analyzeEventContracts given mixed coverage when analyzed then fully uncovered gaps sort first
analyzeEventContracts given any analysis when completed then report includes analyzedAt timestamp
analyzeEventContracts given topics inside node_modules when analyzed then they are excluded
computeFlakeScores given no records when computing scores then returns empty array
computeFlakeScores given a test that always passes when computing scores then it is excluded by default
computeFlakeScores given a healthy test when includeHealthy is true then it is included with flakeRate 0
computeFlakeScores given a test that sometimes fails when computing scores then isFlaky is true
computeFlakeScores given a test that always fails when computing scores then isAlwaysFailing is true
computeFlakeScores given 1 failure in 3 runs when computing scores then flakeRate rounds to 3 decimal places
computeFlakeScores given records with varying durations when computing scores then avgDurationMs is rounded mean
computeFlakeScores given always-failing and flaky tests when computing scores then always-failing sorts first
computeFlakeScores given two flaky tests when computing scores then higher flake rate sorts first
computeFlakeScores given records from different layers when computing scores then each score uses layer of its records
computeFlakeScores given records for multiple tests when computing scores then each test gets its own score
InProcessEventBus publish given a subscriber when event is published then handler is called with correct payload
InProcessEventBus publish given a provided correlationId when event is published then payload carries it through
InProcessEventBus publish given multiple subscribers on same topic when event is published then all handlers are called
InProcessEventBus publish given no subscribers when event is published then no error is thrown
InProcessEventBus publish given subscribers on different topics when event is published then only matching handler is called
InProcessEventBus unsubscribeAll given active subscribers when unsubscribeAll is called then no handlers are invoked on subsequent publish
OrderService createOrder given valid request when creating order then persists order with PENDING status
OrderService createOrder given valid request when creating order then calculates total amount correctly
OrderService createOrder given valid request when creating order then publishes order.created event
OrderService createOrder given empty customerId when creating order then throws validation error
OrderService createOrder given no items when creating order then throws validation error
OrderService createOrder given unknown productId when creating order then throws validation error
OrderService createOrder given zero quantity when creating order then throws validation error
OrderService confirmOrder given PENDING order when confirming then transitions to CONFIRMED
OrderService confirmOrder given PENDING order when confirming then publishes order.confirmed event
OrderService confirmOrder given CONFIRMED order when confirming again then throws state transition error
OrderService confirmOrder given non-existent orderId when confirming then throws not found error
OrderService cancelOrder given PENDING order when cancelling then transitions to CANCELLED
OrderService cancelOrder given SHIPPED order when cancelling then throws because cancellation is not allowed
OrderService getOrder given an existing order when getOrder is called then returns the order
OrderService getOrder given a nonexistent id when getOrder is called then throws not found error
OrderService getOrdersByCustomer given multiple orders when filtering by customer then returns only that customers orders
SqliteOrderRepository findById given a saved order when findById is called then returns the order
SqliteOrderRepository findById given no matching order when findById is called then returns null
SqliteOrderRepository findAll given an empty repository when findAll is called then returns empty array
SqliteOrderRepository findAll given multiple saved orders when findAll is called then returns all orders
SqliteOrderRepository findWhere given orders with different statuses when filtered by status then returns only matching orders
SqliteOrderRepository save given a new order when saved then returns the same order
SqliteOrderRepository update given an existing order when updated then returns the merged order
SqliteOrderRepository update given a nonexistent id when updated then returns null
SqliteOrderRepository delete given an existing order when deleted then returns true and order is gone
SqliteOrderRepository delete given a nonexistent id when deleted then returns false
SqliteOrderRepository close given an open connection when close is called then does not throw
TestRunStore append given a new record when appended then it can be read back
TestRunStore append given records from different layers when appended then each goes to its own file
TestRunStore readAll given empty store when reading all then returns empty array
TestRunStore readAll given records across layers when reading all then all records are returned sorted by runAt
TestRunStore readSince given records at different times when reading since cutoff then only newer records are returned
TestRunStore readSince given empty store when reading since cutoff then returns empty array
TestRunStore readByTest given multiple test names when reading by name then only matching records are returned
TestRunStore readByTest given no records for a test name when reading by name then returns empty array
